quests.name: Q3: The Miller's Curse
quests.description: The Evil Miller wards King Haradur's grave with a spell. Grind undead bones in his own mill to dispel it, then put the king to rest.

objectives.description: Collect 20 Undead Bones (Cursed Farmers and Archers)
Grind the bones at the Mill to dispel the ward
Slay the Evil Miller (immune until the ward is broken!)
Map 2: recover the Emerald Rune fragment (Slain Assassins)
Map 2: slay The Crimson Arrow — it carries the second fragment
